description_long: This object is a vibrant cluster of pink and magenta flowers, each bloom composed of multiple ruffled petals that overlap in a dense, rounded arrangement. The flowers are attached to a green stem, which is partially visible and supports several broad, ovate leaves with smooth edges and a slightly glossy surface. The petals display subtle gradients of color, ranging from deep magenta to lighter pink, giving the cluster a lively and natural appearance. The leaves are arranged alternately along the stem and exhibit a healthy, fresh green hue. The overall structure suggests a flowering plant commonly found in urban gardens, parks, or as decorative landscaping along sidewalks. The naturalistic details and coloration make it suitable for realistic urban or park environments.
description: A lush cluster of pink and magenta ruffled flowers with broad green ovate leaves and a sturdy green stem. The blooms are densely packed, creating a vibrant, natural appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense cluster of pink and magenta flowers with several green ovate leaves fanning out from the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the layered petals and the elongated green leaves extending outward, with the flower cluster angled slightly upward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the flower cluster and more of the supporting green stem, with leaves visible on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the underside of the flower cluster and a clearer view of the leaf arrangement along the stem.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, whorled configuration with overlapping and slightly ruffled edges, forming a rounded, clustered inflorescence. The arrangement lacks strict radial symmetry but displays a layered, multi-tiered structure typical of many ornamental garden flowers.
